title: Enchanted HardCore V1.4
body:
# Enchanted HardCore

**Enchanted HardCore** offers a **vanilla-like hardcore experience** with a magical twist and an intense challenge.

Featuring **custom world generation** and a **skill tree system**, Enchanted HardCore is **multiplayer-friendly**, with **built-in voice chat** and **Essentials mod** support to make playing with friends smoother and more enjoyable.

## Requirements
- A 4-core CPU at 3GHz or higher
- 2GB of RAM is the bare minimum (**expect crashes**); **4GB or more recommended**
- Integrated GPU with 512MB VRAM can run the modpack

## Known Bugs
- Visual glitches with items in hand [ ]
- Chunk loading crashes [Fixed]
- Memory usage spikes [Fixed]
- Connection issues with Essentials [Fixed]

## 🛍️ Highlights

- ⚔️ Hardcore difficulty with balanced progression
- 🌍 Custom world generation for fresh exploration
- 🌲 Skill trees to customize and empower your character
- 🗣️ Built-in voice chat and Essentials for seamless co-op play
- 🚀 Optimized for performance
- 🛠️ Server pack coming soon for easy multiplayer hosting

---

Whether you're venturing alone or with friends, **Enchanted HardCore** will push your survival skills to the limit in a beautifully dangerous, enchanted world.
